title: Messerschmidia vauthieri
taxonomy: Messerschmidia vauthieri is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to China and is a member of the Asclepiadoideae subfamily. Messerschmidia vauthieri is further classified under the order Gentianales and the class Magnoliopsida. This classification places it within the broader plant kingdom, specifically in the division Magnoliophyta. Its classification reflects its relationship to other flowering plants within the Apocynaceae family.
